L0_Value.comment: This parameter is the measure of fuel gauge sensor converted in litre using Vx_FUNC_Rx table.

lists.1: Battery voltage too low for measure
Meas not possible - delay since Ign OFF < 1 mn
Display corresponds to the stored value

PartNumber.BasicPartList.comment: 5Digits - Forcé à $02 (signifiant le type de SW)

HardwareNumber.BasicPartList.comment: 5Digits - Forcé à $01 (signifiant le type de HW)

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level out of range / zero adjt failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect

lists.49153: Lost CAN communication or BUS OFF

ClusterProductionNumber_ASCII.comment: numéro de série unique du tdb

Telltales_Control.comment: This service is able to manage permanently all telltales (internal and external) driven by the micro

lists.1: All sounds (BUIC file) in order with blank of 1 s

Sound_Control.comment: This service is able to manage permanently the sound(s) driven by the microcontroller.

Display_Control.comment: This service is able to manage permanently the display(s) driven by the microcontroller.

Pointer_Control.comment: This service is able to manage permanently pointer(s) driven by the microcontroller.

Backlight_Control.comment: This service is able to manage permanently the backlight(s) driven by the microcontroller.

GearBoxType_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the GearBox type (manual or automatic) of the vehicle.

CarburationType_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the carburation type of the vehicle.

DistanceUnit_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the distance unit type (km or miles).

VolumeUnit_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the volume unit (manual or automatic) of the vehicle.

TripComputerType_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the trip computer type displayed.

CCSLACCServiceCustomer_CF.comment: This parameter allows type of speed control

FrontSBRInhibition_CF.comment: This parameter allows the activation or not of Front Seat Belt Reminder warning (sound & Flashing)

ESCPresent_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ESC ECU.

TPMSPresent_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of TPMS

OverspeedWarningPresent_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of overspeed warning (10204_1).

PowerSteeringType_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the type of the power steering.

DayBacklightsPresent_CF.comment: This configuration is used to force the backlight of the cluster to be ON in day mode.

OilPressureThreshold_CF.comment: This configuration is used for the oil pressure warning.

EMMPresent_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of EMM ECU

BodyType_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the body type.

RearSBRPresent_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of rear Seat Belt Reminder.

ExternalTemperaturePresent_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the external temperature management.

AirbagPresent_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of AIRBAG ECU.

MuteRadioFunction_CF.comment: This parameter defines the default temperature unit that must be displayed by the Cluster ECU.

ClockDisplayMode_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the format display of the clock.

DimmingStrategy_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the strategy of dimming.

DigitalSpeedometerPresent_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the present and the unit of the digital speed.

ClusterCurrentDistanceByDiag_CF.comment: This parameter allows R/W of the total current_distance (see EN_ODO_012), with a resolution of 1km.

FuelGaugingType_CF.comment: The "FuelGaugingType_CF" parameter defines the fuel gauging type, with fuel flow strategy or not
